title: Get guaranteed JSON output with output_config

body.goal: Make Claude return a response that is guaranteed to be valid JSON matching your schema — no parsing errors, no missing fields, no retries needed.
steps: Define a JSON Schema for your desired output. All properties must be listed in the 'required' array (structured outputs don't support optional fields).
In your API request, set output_config.format to { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'YourSchemaName', schema: yourSchema } }.
Describe what you want in the prompt as usual. Claude will respond with JSON that exactly matches the schema.
Parse the response: the first content block's text field contains the JSON string. Use JSON.parse() — it is guaranteed to succeed.
Handle the edge case: if stop_reason is 'max_tokens', the output may be truncated and not valid JSON. Check stop_reason before parsing.
